content:
MODULE: cosmos.agents.agent_debates
FILE: cosmos/agents/agent_debates.py (693 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Agent Debates - Multi-Agent Discussion & Synthesis

Novel Approaches:
1. Structured Argumentation - Formal debate protocols
2. Confidence-Weighted Voting - Score-based consensus
3. Perspective Diversity - Ensure varied viewpoints
4. Synthesis Engine - Combine best insights

CLASSES:
- DebateRole(Enum): Roles in a debate.
- ArgumentType(Enum): Types of arguments.
- Argument: A single argument in a debate.
  Methods: def average_rating(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- DebatePosition: A position being debated.
  Methods: def get_consensus(self) -> float
- Debate: A structured debate between agents.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- AgentDebates: Multi-agent debate and discussion system.

Features:
- Structured debate protoco
  Methods: async def start_debate(self, topic: str, positions: Optional[list[str]]=None, agent_generators: Opti
  Methods: async def run_debate(self, debate_id: str, agent_fn: Optional[Callable]=None) -> Debate
  Methods: async def add_argument(self, debate_id: str, agent_id: str, content: str, role: DebateRole=DebateRol
  Methods: async def vote(self, debate_id: str, agent_id: str, position_id: str, vote: float) -> bool
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
